MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS NARRATIVE NATION, INC., KIMBERLY ALLERS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Defendants' "motion to set aside default" is granted. It is the California courts' strong policy to decide cases on their merits. (Fasuyi v. Permatex, Inc. (2008) 167 Cal.App.4th 681, 695.)

Order is signed after the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
